pr_text:
## Title: Fix MCS selection in MBMS to consider channel quality and UE capability

### Summary
The MBMS PMCH configuration previously used a static MCS value from M2AP scheduling information without considering actual channel quality or UE receiver capabilities. This could result in excessive block error rates when channel conditions were poor, or suboptimal throughput when UEs supported higher-order modulation. The fix introduces dynamic MCS selection that adapts to real-time channel conditions
